name: Big Murph, Whatever Crawled Out of the Water Treatment Plant
type: Legendary Acorn Creature — Sludge Leviathan Horror
text:
When Big Murph enters the battlefield, the reservoir burps: each player reveals the top card of their library and Big Murph eats every snack on the table. Put a sludge counter on Big Murph for each card revealed this way.
Feed (Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on Big Murph.)
Big Murph gets +1/+1 for each sludge counter on it. As long as Big Murph has seven or more sludge counters on it, it has trample.
{2}{R}{G}, Remove half of the sludge counters on Big Murph, rounded down: Big Murph lashes out at the whole town — it deals damage equal to its power to each opponent and you draw a card. Everyone agrees it was the water all along.
flavorText: Forty years of runoff, expired snacks, and uncounted ballots. It was bound to learn to swim eventually.

extras.newMechanic: Feed — the whole table's dice/coins/votes grow Big Murph via sludge counters
extras.communalKaiju: scaling boss that menaces every opponent at once
